c.d: Number of active users on the platform; higher user base allows for broader connection with friends.
Variety and quality of communication tools available (e.g., text, voice, video, file sharing).
Features that facilitate group communication and activities (e.g., group chats, shared calendars, collaborative playlists).
Options for managing privacy and controlling who can see your content and contact you.
Ability to connect and share content with other social media platforms and services.
